summary: No meaningful architectural drift after packet 13. Schema, all 12 API contracts, CSS design system, dependency parsing pipeline, Python health check enrichment, and tracker state all match the intended architecture. All 261/261 tests pass. Only finding is carryover VCS hygiene (7 untracked test files).
notes: Packets 11-13 all verified: commits endpoint reuses parse_git_log (no duplication), dep parsers maintain standard {name, version, manager} shape, health enricher maps version→current_version correctly, no premature DB writes. Prior drift repair (Full Scan button scope bug) confirmed still in place with regression test. 2 transparent CSS border tokens (--fresh-border-this-month, --fresh-border-older) are defined but unreferenced — design placeholders, not drift. repositories.last_quick_scan_at defined in spec+code but never written — spec-level slot for future use, not a regression.
